eng.definition: the fact of two things being seen or placed close together with contrasting effect.
examples: The juxtaposition of these two images creates an interesting contrast.
The film's end was a bleak juxtaposition to its cheery beginning.
The juxtaposition of their differing opinions led to a great debate.
मेरी दिल्ली की यात्रा बहुत ही मनोरंजक थी।
मैं अपनी जीवन यात्रा को स्वर्णिम अक्षरों में लिखना चाहता हूँ।
उन्होंने अपनी यात्रा का विवरण दिया।
